content:
Intent: cancellation_request.
Example 1: Intent: cancellation_request. Tone: concise. Pesanan [ORDER_ID] belum diproses, jadi saya bisa langsung batalkan. Pembatalan telah berhasil. Dana akan dikembalikan ke saldo OVO Anda dalam 24 jam. Apakah Anda ingin memesan ulang dengan ukuran yang benar sekarang?
Example 2: Intent: cancellation_request. Tone: professional. Baik, saya faham. Untuk pesanan [ORDER_ID], ia belum dihantar lagi jadi pembatalan masih boleh dilakukan. Saya akan proses pembatalan sekarang dan bayaran akan dikembalikan dalam 3-5 hari bekerja. Anda akan menerima pengesahan melalui e-mel.
Example 3: Intent: cancellation_request. Tone: concise. Baik, saya akan membantu anda membatalkan pesanan [ORDER_ID]. Sila sahkan pembatalan ini. Jika pesanan belum diproses penghantaran, ia akan dibatalkan serta-merta dan pembayaran anda akan dikembalikan dalam 3-5 hari bekerja. Jika sudah dihantar, anda mungkin perlu membuat pemulangan selepas menerima barang. Adakah anda pasti mahu meneruskan?

Intent: complaint_handling.
Example 1: Intent: complaint_handling. Tone: apologetic. I deeply apologize for the poor experience you've had. Your frustration is completely valid. I'm taking personal ownership of your case now. Please provide your case number or order details, and I will escalate this to our senior team for immediate resolution within 24 hours.
Example 2: Intent: complaint_handling. Tone: professional. Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and I apologize for the substandard packaging. We have strict packaging guidelines, and this incident is being reviewed with our logistics team to prevent recurrence. We appreciate your feedback as it helps us improve. For your next order, we will ensure reinforced packaging is used. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
Example 3: Intent: complaint_handling. Tone: apologetic. I sincerely apologize for the double charge and the poor experience you've had. This is not the standard of service we aim for. I've escalated your case to our senior billing team for immediate review. They will contact you within 24 hours to resolve the duplicate charge and ensure a full refund if applicable. Your order reference is [ORDER_ID]. Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and again, I am deeply sorry.

Intent: exchange_request.
Example 1: Intent: exchange_request. Tone: friendly. Tentu bisa! Kami menyediakan penukaran dalam 15 hari. Untuk sepatu ukuran 42 yang Anda terima, silakan ajukan penukaran di menu 'Pesanan Saya' dan pilih opsi 'Tukar Ukuran'. Pastikan sepatu belum dipakai dan masih ada kotak aslinya. Setelah pengajuan diterima, kami akan segera mengirimkan ukuran 41 ke alamat Anda. Jika stok ukuran 41 habis, kami akan hubungi Anda untuk alternatif lain.
Example 2: Intent: exchange_request. Tone: professional. Sudah tentu, kami boleh bantu dengan pertukaran saiz. Sila log masuk ke akaun anda, pergi ke 'Pesanan Saya', pilih item tersebut, dan klik 'Tukar'. Pilih saiz baharu yang dikehendaki. Jika stok saiz baharu masih ada, proses pertukaran akan diteruskan. Anda akan menerima label penghantaran prabayar untuk menghantar item asal kembali kepada kami.
Example 3: Intent: exchange_request. Tone: friendly. Hai! Tentu boleh. Kami minta maaf atas kesilapan ini. Untuk proses pertukaran, sila ambil gambar label saiz pada baju yang diterima dan hantar kepada kami. Kami akan sediakan baju saiz M yang betul dan atur penghantaran percuma. Anda boleh simpan saiz S buat sementara waktu, dan penghantar akan mengambilnya semasa penghantaran baju baru.

Intent: order_status.
Example 1: Intent: order_status. Tone: friendly. Hi there! I'd be happy to check on that for you. Your order [ORDER_ID] was dispatched yesterday and is currently in transit with our logistics partner. You can expect delivery within the next 2-3 business days. Let me know if you need the tracking link!
Example 2: Intent: order_status. Tone: friendly. Hi there! Your order [ORDER_ID] is currently with our delivery partner and out for delivery today. You can track the live location of your parcel in the app's 'My Orders' section. The estimated arrival time is between 2 PM and 6 PM.
Example 3: Intent: order_status. Tone: concise. Hello! Your order [ORDER_ID] has been dispatched and is currently in transit to the delivery hub. You can expect it within the next 2-3 business days. For real-time tracking, you may check the 'My Orders' section in your account.

Intent: out_of_stock.
Example 1: Intent: out_of_stock. Tone: friendly. Terima kasih atas pertanyaan. Baju kurung moden saiz L memang sangat popular. Kami jangka stok baru akan tersedia dalam masa 2-3 minggu. Anda boleh klik butang 'Maklumkan Saya' pada halaman produk untuk menerima e-mel pemberitahuan sebaik sahaja ia kembali dalam stok.
Example 2: Intent: out_of_stock. Tone: friendly. Hai! Terima kasih kerana berminat dengan baju tersebut. Sayang sekali ia kehabisan stok buat masa ini. Anda boleh klik butang "Beritahu Saya" pada halaman produk untuk mendapatkan notifikasi sebaik sahaja ia kembali tersedia. Biasanya, stok diisi semula dalam masa 2-3 minggu. Adakah anda ingin kami cadangkan item serupa yang ada dalam stok sekarang?
Example 3: Intent: out_of_stock. Tone: sales_oriented. Kami sedang dalam proses untuk mendapatkan stok baru bagi beg tote kulit ini. Anda boleh klik 'Notify Me' di halaman produk untuk menerima pemberitahuan sebaik sahaja ia tersedia. Sementara itu, mungkin anda berminat dengan beg kami yang lain?

Intent: payment_issue.
Example 1: Intent: payment_issue. Tone: professional. Terima kasih kerana memaklumkan kami. Kegagalan transaksi kad kredit mungkin disebabkan oleh beberapa faktor seperti limit kad, kesilapan memasukkan butiran, atau sistem bank yang sementara tidak tersedia. Sila pastikan butiran kad anda betul dan cuba sekali lagi. Jika masalah berterusan, anda boleh cuba menggunakan kaedah pembayaran lain seperti perbankan dalam talian atau e-dompet. Wang tidak akan dipotong untuk transaksi yang gagal.
Example 2: Intent: payment_issue. Tone: friendly. Halo! Terima kasih sudah menghubungi kami. Saya bisa bantu cek masalah pembayaran Anda. Beberapa kemungkinan penyebab kegagalan pembayaran kartu kredit: 1) Verifikasi 3D Secure belum selesai, 2) Ada batasan transaksi dari bank penerbit, 3) Sistem sedang maintenance. Coba langkah ini: refresh halaman, pastikan pop-up tidak diblokir, atau gunakan metode pembayaran alternatif seperti transfer bank atau COD. Jika masih bermasalah, saya bisa bantu hubungkan dengan tim payment kami.
Example 3: Intent: payment_issue. Tone: professional. Untuk pembayaran melalui e-dompet yang gagal tetapi wang dipotong, sistem biasanya akan mengembalikan wang secara automatik dalam tempoh 24 jam. Jika anda tidak menerima bayaran balik selepas 24 jam, sila hantar tangkapan skrin bukti potongan dan ID pesanan kepada kami untuk siasatan lanjut dengan pihak e-dompet.

Intent: product_defect.
Example 1: Intent: product_defect. Tone: apologetic. I sincerely apologize for the defective product you received. This is certainly not the quality we aim to deliver. Please do not use the blender for safety reasons. We will arrange for a free return pickup and send you a brand-new replacement unit immediately. Could you please upload a photo of the cracked lid through the app's support section for our records?
Example 2: Intent: product_defect. Tone: apologetic. I'm really sorry to hear about the issue with your blender. A grinding noise is not normal and suggests a defect. We'd like to make this right for you. Could you please provide your order number? We can arrange for a replacement or a full refund—whichever you prefer.
Example 3: Intent: product_defect. Tone: apologetic. I sincerely apologize for the defective product you received. This is certainly not the standard we aim for. Please do not use the blender further for safety. We will arrange a free return pickup and send you a brand new replacement unit at no cost. Would you like to proceed with the replacement, or would you prefer a full refund?

Intent: product_inquiry.
Example 1: Intent: product_inquiry. Tone: professional. Hello! The wireless earbuds with ANC include three sizes of silicone ear tips (S, M, L) for a comfortable fit. The charging case provides an additional 24 hours of battery life on top of the earbuds' own 8 hours. Is there anything else you'd like to know about this product?
Example 2: Intent: product_inquiry. Tone: friendly. Hello! Thank you for your interest in our wireless earbuds. Yes, these earbuds do feature active noise cancellation. The battery life is approximately 6 hours with ANC on, and the charging case provides an additional 18 hours. Would you like to know about any other features or availability?
Example 3: Intent: product_inquiry. Tone: friendly. Hello! Thanks for your interest in our wireless earbuds. Yes, they are fully compatible with both Android and iOS devices via Bluetooth 5.0. The battery life is approximately 6 hours on a single charge, and the included charging case provides an additional 24 hours of power. Is there anything else you'd like to know about the features?

Intent: refund_request.
Example 1: Intent: refund_request. Tone: concise. Baik, saya faham anda ingin membuat permohonan refund untuk pesanan [ORDER_ID]. Untuk memproses refund, sila sediakan gambar barang yang diterima dan nyatakan perbezaan dengan penerangan asal. Saya akan bantu anda dengan proses ini. Refund penuh akan diproses dalam tempoh 3-5 hari bekerja selepas kelulusan.
Example 2: Intent: refund_request. Tone: professional. Terima kasih telah menghubungi kami. Kami akan segera memproses permintaan pengembalian dana Anda. Mohon untuk mengisi formulir pengembalian melalui halaman 'Pesanan Saya' dengan menyertakan foto produk yang tidak sesuai. Setelah diverifikasi, dana akan dikembalikan ke metode pembayaran asli Anda dalam 3-7 hari kerja. Apakah ada informasi lain yang Anda butuhkan?
Example 3: Intent: refund_request. Tone: professional. Baik, saya akan proses permintaan pengembalian dana Anda untuk pesanan [ORDER_ID]. Untuk mempercepat proses, mohon unggah foto produk yang diterima melalui pusat resolusi di aplikasi. Dana akan dikembalikan ke metode pembayaran asal Anda dalam 5-7 hari kerja setelah disetujui.

Intent: return_policy.
Example 1: Intent: return_policy. Tone: friendly. Hello! For electronics, our return policy allows returns within 14 days of delivery if the item is unused and in its original packaging. Since you've opened it, we'd need to inspect it first, but you can still initiate a return request through your account.
Example 2: Intent: return_policy. Tone: friendly. No worries! We offer a 15-day return policy for clothing items. As long as the dress is unworn, with original tags attached, and in its original packaging, you can initiate a return through the 'My Orders' section. We'll provide a free return label for you. Would you like me to guide you through the process?
Example 3: Intent: return_policy. Tone: professional. Our return policy for electronics allows returns within 7 days of receipt if the item is defective or not as described. For your case, please initiate a return request from your order history. We will arrange a pickup and provide a full refund or replacement once we receive the item back.

Intent: shipping_delay.
Example 1: Intent: shipping_delay. Tone: professional. I apologize for the delay with your order [ORDER_ID]. I've checked with our logistics partner, and there was an unexpected operational delay at the regional sorting center. Your package is now back in transit, and the tracking should update within the next 12-24 hours. The revised estimated delivery date is within 3 business days. We appreciate your patience and will monitor it closely.
Example 2: Intent: shipping_delay. Tone: apologetic. I sincerely apologize for the delay with your order [ORDER_ID]. I've checked with our logistics partner and there's been a slight backlog at the sorting center. Your package is now en route and is expected to arrive within the next 48 hours. I'll send you a notification once it's out for delivery.
Example 3: Intent: shipping_delay. Tone: professional. I understand your concern regarding the delayed tracking updates for order [ORDER_ID]. Let me investigate this further with our logistics partner. It's possible there's a delay in the tracking system update or the package is in transit between hubs. I'll contact the courier service and get back to you with a specific update within 24 hours. We appreciate your patience.

Intent: size_recommendation.
Example 1: Intent: size_recommendation. Tone: friendly. Berdasarkan ukuran anda (170cm, 65kg), saiz M (Medium) atau L (Large) biasanya sesuai untuk seluar jeans kami. Saiz M mungkin lebih ketat di bahagian paha, manakala L lebih selesa. Untuk ketepatan, saya sarankan anda menyemak carta saiz kami di halaman produk dan mengukur pinggang serta pinggul anda. Jika anda memilih antara dua saiz, ambil yang lebih besar untuk keselesaan. Adakah anda perlukan bantuan lanjut?
Example 2: Intent: size_recommendation. Tone: friendly. Berdasarkan ukuran anda, kami syorkan saiz M untuk baju kurung tersebut. Saiz ini biasanya sesuai untuk tinggi 158-163cm dan berat 52-58kg. Namun, kami cadangkan anda menyemak panduan saiz terperinci di halaman produk kerana potongan mungkin berbeza. Jika anda masih tidak pasti, boleh beritahu saya ukuran dada dan pinggang anda untuk cadangan yang lebih tepat.
Example 3: Intent: size_recommendation. Tone: friendly. Berdasarkan ukuran anda, saya cadangkan saiz M. Saiz ini biasanya sesuai untuk orang dengan tinggi 160-170cm dan berat 50-60kg. Namun, anda juga boleh menyemak carta saiz yang tertera di halaman produk untuk pengukuran yang lebih tepat.

Intent: voucher_issue.
Example 1: Intent: voucher_issue. Tone: friendly. Hai! Terima kasih kerana menghubungi kami. Saya sudah semak voucher [VOUCHER_CODE] dan mendapati ia telah tamat tempoh pada 15hb lepas. Voucher ini sah untuk tempoh 30 hari sahaja. Anda boleh lihat semua voucher aktif anda di bahagian 'Dompet Saya'. Jika ada masalah lain, saya sedia membantu!
Example 2: Intent: voucher_issue. Tone: friendly. Hai! Terima kasih kerana menghubungi kami. Saya dah semak kod voucher anda, dan ia sah untuk pembelian minimum RM50. Mungkin anda belum mencapai jumlah minimum itu. Cuba tambah item lain atau guna kod pada pembelian seterusnya. Ada apa-apa lagi yang boleh saya bantu?
Example 3: Intent: voucher_issue. Tone: friendly. Hai! Terima kasih kerana menghubungi kami. Saya sudah semak kod [VOUCHER_CODE] dan nampaknya ia sah. Sila pastikan nilai pesanan anda memenuhi minimum pembelian, dan ia hanya boleh digunakan pada produk yang mengambil bahagian. Jika masih tak berfungsi, sila beritahu saya!

Intent: warranty_question.
Example 1: Intent: warranty_question. Tone: professional. Yes, our blenders come with a 1-year manufacturer's warranty from the date of purchase. To claim warranty service, please provide your order number [ORDER_ID] and a description or video of the malfunction. Our team will guide you through the repair or replacement process. Do you have your purchase receipt handy?
Example 2: Intent: warranty_question. Tone: professional. Yes, all our electric kettles come with a 12-month manufacturer's warranty from the date of purchase. The warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship under normal use. It does not cover damage from accidents, misuse, or unauthorized repairs. To claim, you'll need your order confirmation and a description of the issue.
Example 3: Intent: warranty_question. Tone: professional. Thank you for your inquiry. Most electronic devices sold on our platform include a manufacturer's warranty, typically ranging from 6 to 12 months. You can find the specific warranty information on the product page under 'Specifications' or 'Warranty Details'. If you need further assistance, please share the product link or ID, and I'll provide the exact terms.

Intent: wrong_item_received.
Example 1: Intent: wrong_item_received. Tone: professional. I apologize for the mix-up. For [ORDER_ID], we've sent the wrong item. Please file a return request for the incorrect item, and we will ship the correct red dress to you immediately. The return shipping is on us.
Example 2: Intent: wrong_item_received. Tone: professional. 非常抱歉给您带来不便。这是我们发货的失误。请您提供订单号[ORDER_ID]，我们会立即安排取回错误商品并寄出正确的iPhone 14手机壳，同时我们会补偿您一张优惠券。
Example 3: Intent: wrong_item_received. Tone: concise. 非常抱歉给您发错了颜色。我们将立即为您安排正确的商品。请您提供订单编号[ORDER_ID]，我们将安排免费取回错误的商品并寄出您原本订购的蓝色T恤。处理时间约为5-7个工作日。再次为我们的失误表示歉意。
